fields.name: benchmark_case_id
fields.description: Stable benchmark case identifier encoding every swept parameter.

fields.name: benchmark_group
fields.description: Benchmark grouping label emitted by the runner; currently read.

fields.name: workload_implementation
fields.description: Library or integration executing the workload; currently huggingface_datasets.

fields.name: workload_scenario
fields.description: Operation exercised within the workload implementation; currently read.

fields.name: config_sweep_axis
fields.description: Configuration axis that produced this case, or baseline for the implicit baseline case.

fields.name: workload_family
fields.description: Broad benchmark row family controlling which fields are populated; currently data_loading.

fields.name: distributed_backend
fields.description: Auto-detected distributed execution backend, such as gloo or nccl; an environment fact rather than a benchmark parameter.

fields.name: compute_accelerator_type
fields.description: Auto-detected compute accelerator type, currently cpu or gpu; an environment fact rather than a benchmark parameter.

fields.name: machine_type
fields.description: GCE machine type of the benchmark VM; empty outside GCE.

fields.name: world_size
fields.description: Number of distributed ranks participating in the case; 1 for a single-rank case.

fields.name: gcs_bucket_name
fields.description: Isolated GCS bucket created for this benchmark case and used for Cloud Monitoring correlation.

fields.name: bucket_type
fields.description: Storage tier of the case bucket: regional, zonal (RAPID), or hns.

fields.name: benchmark_source_commit_sha
fields.description: Cloud Build source revision containing the benchmark harness, configuration, and pipeline.

fields.name: requirements_override
fields.description: Normalized whitespace-separated Python requirement specs installed after the group pins; empty when the copied checkout is used unchanged.

fields.name: requirements_resolved
fields.description: JSON list from pip describing final installed distribution names and resolved versions.

fields.name: config_sweep_axes_requested
fields.description: Normalized requested config sweep axes, or all when the complete group was selected; baseline is included automatically.

fields.name: measurement_round_count
fields.description: Number of measured full-corpus iterations represented by the round-duration statistics.

fields.name: dataloader_num_workers
fields.description: DataLoader worker process count per distributed rank; 0 means in-process loading.

fields.name: batch_size_samples
fields.description: Number of samples yielded per data batch.

fields.name: sample_sequence_length_tokens
fields.description: Number of tokens in each generated dataset sample.

fields.name: dataset_format
fields.description: On-GCS representation of the generated dataset, such as pretok_parquet, text_parquet, or pretok_jsonl.

fields.name: parquet_row_group_size_rows
fields.description: Number of rows per Parquet row group; not applicable to non-Parquet formats.

fields.name: dataset_file_count
fields.description: Number of files in the generated dataset.

fields.name: dataset_size_bytes
fields.description: Total stored size in bytes of the generated GCS dataset objects.

fields.name: dataset_sample_count
fields.description: Total number of samples in the generated dataset; every measured iteration must yield this count.

fields.name: dataloader_prefetch_factor
fields.description: Number of batches prefetched by each DataLoader worker; meaningful only when the worker count is greater than zero.

fields.name: read_access_pattern
fields.description: Dataset traversal pattern, currently sequential or shuffled.

fields.name: dataset_split_by_node_enabled
fields.description: Whether the dataset is partitioned across distributed ranks with split-by-node semantics.

fields.name: persistent_data_loader_workers_enabled
fields.description: Whether DataLoader worker processes persist between measured iterations.

fields.name: shuffle_max_buffer_input_shards
fields.description: Maximum input shards retained separately by streaming shuffle; 0 selects the library default.

fields.name: dataset_read_throughput_mean_bytes_per_second
fields.description: Mean logical dataset-read throughput in bytes per second across measured iterations.

fields.name: mean_samples_per_second
fields.description: Mean dataset-read throughput in samples per second across measured iterations.

fields.name: time_to_first_batch_seconds
fields.description: Duration in seconds from starting the first measured iteration until its first batch is received.

fields.name: dataset_build_time
fields.description: Duration in seconds spent constructing and preparing the dataset before measured iteration.

fields.name: measurement_window_start_unix_seconds
fields.description: Unix timestamp in seconds at the beginning of the measured read window.

fields.name: measurement_window_end_unix_seconds
fields.description: Unix timestamp in seconds at the end of the measured read window.

fields.name: dataset_read_bytes
fields.description: Bytes reported by the GCS network sent-bytes metric for the isolated case bucket during the measurement window.

fields.name: dataset_read_request_count
fields.description: Count of GCS ReadObject and BidiReadObject requests for the isolated case bucket during the measurement window.

fields.name: dataset_read_amplification_ratio
fields.description: GCS network bytes sent divided by dataset size times measurement round count; 1 means each stored byte was served once per round.

fields.name: cpu_usage_peak_cores
fields.description: Peak CPU usage in cores summed across the benchmark process tree during the measurement window.

fields.name: memory_usage_peak_bytes
fields.description: Peak resident memory in bytes summed across the benchmark process tree during the measurement window.

fields.name: network_received_mean_bytes_per_sec
fields.description: Mean host network receive rate in bytes per second during the measurement window.

fields.name: network_sent_mean_bytes_per_sec
fields.description: Mean host network send rate in bytes per second during the measurement window.

fields.name: host_vcpu_count
fields.description: vCPU count of the benchmark host.

fields.name: round_duration_min_seconds
fields.description: Minimum measured round duration in seconds; one round is one full-corpus iteration.

fields.name: round_duration_max_seconds
fields.description: Maximum measured round duration in seconds.

fields.name: round_duration_mean_seconds
fields.description: Arithmetic mean of measured round durations in seconds.

fields.name: round_duration_p50_seconds
fields.description: 50th-percentile measured round duration in seconds.

fields.name: round_duration_stddev_seconds
fields.description: Standard deviation of measured round durations in seconds.

fields.name: round_duration_p90_seconds
fields.description: 90th-percentile measured round duration in seconds.

fields.name: round_duration_p95_seconds
fields.description: 95th-percentile measured round duration in seconds.

fields.name: round_duration_p99_seconds
fields.description: 99th-percentile measured round duration in seconds.
